task_completion.description: Log in to the OpenMRS Administration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS Administration dashboard or home page is visible in the web browser, confirming successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Provider Management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage Providers' page or a similar provider administration interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Search for the target provider 'Dr. Temporary Provider' or 'PROV-TEMP'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search field contains 'Temporary Provider' or 'PROV-TEMP', and the corresponding provider record appears in the search results.

task_completion.description: Open the target provider record for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit page or form for the provider 'Temporary Provider' (Identifier: PROV-TEMP) is displayed.

task_completion.description: Mark the provider as retired and enter the retirement reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Retired' (or similar) checkbox is checked, and the exact text 'Contract Ended' is entered into the 'Retire Reason' or 'Reason' text field.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to retire the provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Provider saved successfully') is visible, or the provider list shows the provider's status as retired.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMRS web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenMRS UI, not a terminal window executing curl commands, python scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show progressive steps of navigating menus, filling out forms, and clicking buttons in the browser, rather than just jumping to a final state.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success message or UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/DevTools) are not open in any of the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Provider Identifier: PROV-TEMP. Target Provider Name: Temporary Provider. Expected Retirement Reason: Contract Ended. Admin URL: https://localhost/openmrs/admin. The task requires checking the 'Retired' boolean and setting the 'Retire Reason' text field to 'Contract Ended' for this specific provider in the OpenMRS admin interface.
